zh.Iron Acton, South Gloucestershire Unitar: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Clanvowe於大約1315年出生在英國賀福爾時，她的父親Sir Philip De Clanvowe30歲，母親Philippa Talbot13歲。她於1343年6月27日之前與Sir John Poyntz在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1372年之前在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Clanvowe于大约1315年出生在英国賀福爾时，她的父亲Sir Philip De Clanvowe30岁，母亲Philippa Talbot13岁。她于1343年6月27日之前与Sir John Poyntz在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1372年之前在她的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Clanvowe was born about 1315, in Herefordshire, England, her father, Sir Philip De Clanvowe, was 30 and her mother, Philippa Talbot, was 13. She married Sir John Poyntz before 27 June 1343, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died before 1372, in her hometown, and was buried in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Clanvowe est née environ 1315, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Philip De Clanvowe, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Philippa Talbot, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Poyntz avant 27 juin 1343, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée avant 1372, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Clanvowe um 1315 in Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Philip De Clanvowe 30 und ihre Mutter Philippa Talbot 13. Sie hat vor 27. Juni 1343 in England, United Kingdom Sir John Poyntz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb vor 1372 in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Clanvowe è nata il circa 1315 nel Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Sir Philip De Clanvowe, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Philippa Talbot, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Poyntz prima del 27 giugno 1343, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì prima del 1372, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Clanvoweが約1315年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Philip De Clanvoweは30歳，母Philippa Talbotは13歳であった。1343年6月27日以前にイギリスイギリスでSir John Poyntzと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1372年以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアイロン アクトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Clanvowe(이)가 대략 1315년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Philip De Clanvowe(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Philippa Talbot(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1343년 6월 27일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir John Poyntz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1372년 이전 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 이런 악턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Clanvowe nasceu aproximadamente 1315, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Philip De Clanvowe, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Talbot, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Poyntz antes 27 de junho de 1343, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu antes 1372, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Clanvowe родилась около 1315 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Philip De Clanvowe было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippa Talbot, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Poyntz перед 27 июнь 1343 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла перед 1372 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности ирон актон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir John Poyntz antes de 27 de junio de 1343, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió antes de 1372, en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
